calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Petitioner: Ka Man Chan, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Austin Maximilian Trihn, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Charles Zhang.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Order Dispensing Notice granted and signed in open court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Austin Chan.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Reset To Feb-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Ka Man Chan, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Austin Maximilian Trinh, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Sherrilyn Chen.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Feb. 07, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to re-application with Declaration to the court for an Order dispensing with notice.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
